nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bradburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Bradbourne in Derbyshire or occasionally from Brabourne in Kent, both named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + burna ‘stream’.

en.lifeSummary: Bradbourne I married Roger De Bradbourne II before 1360, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
